---
name: 🔒 Security Issue
about: Report a vulnerability (use this ONLY for non-critical issues — critical ones go to email)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> ⚠️ **For critical vulnerabilities** (credential exposure, encryption bypass, RCE) — do NOT open a public issue.
> Contact the maintainer directly via email (see GitHub profile).

## Affected Component
Which module or file is affected? (e.g. `src-tauri/src/crypto/`, `api/mod.rs`)

## Description
A clear description of the security issue.

## Threat Model
- Who is the attacker? (local user, remote attacker, malicious LLM prompt, etc.)
- What can they gain?
- How realistic is this attack in practice?

## Suggested Fix
If you have a fix in mind, describe it here.

## References
CVEs, OWASP categories, or similar issues in other projects.
